core_mechanism: identifying a parametrized family of discrete configurations with the integer lattice points inside successive integer dilations of a fixed convex polytope, so that their count is given by a lattice-point-enumeration (Ehrhart) polynomial in the dilation parameter
brief_reason: The abstract shows the matrices are exactly the integer points of the r-th dilate of an integral convex polytope (whose vertices are the base-case objects), from which it concludes they are enumerated by an Ehrhart polynomial in r.
